projects.projectName: Hunter-Central Coast Renewable Energy Zone (REZ) Transmission Infrastructure
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 — major substation and transmission packages pre-tender.
projects.summary: Development of critical HV transmission lines, substations (including GIS and transformers) and other network infrastructure to connect new renewable energy projects within the Hunter-Central Coast REZ. Focus on large-scale HV transformers and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: NSW Government progressing with detailed planning and procurement pathways, initial enabling infrastructure tenders expected from mid-2025. Source: energyco.nsw.gov.au (2025).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — major HVDC components procurement active.
projects.summary: Proposed ~250km HVDC cable (Marinus Link 1) linking Tasmania and Victoria, including significant converter stations, HV transformers, and switchgear. FID for Stage 1 expected early 2025.
projects.statusNote: FID for Project Marinus (Stage 1) expected early 2025, with major procurement for HVDC converters and cables ongoing. Source: marinuslink.com.au (2024).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — BESS HV equipment FAT/QAQC procurement active.
projects.summary: A 250MW / 2-hour Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) complementing the gas-fired power station. Involves substantial HV interconnection equipment, transformers, and switchgear for grid integration. Main gas plant operational, BESS under construction.
projects.statusNote: Construction of the BESS component is underway, with expected completion in 2025. HV equipment procurement occurred Q4 2024. Source: energyaustralia.com.au (2025).

projects.projectName: New England Renewable Energy Zone (REZ) Transmission Infrastructure
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q4 2025 — transmission infrastructure tenders expected.
projects.summary: Development of new high voltage transmission lines and substations, including HV transformers and switchgear, to connect up to 8 GW of renewable energy capacity in the New England REZ.
projects.statusNote: EnergyCo NSW progressing with detailed design and procurement pathways for network infrastructure, with tenders expected from mid-2025. Source: energyco.nsw.gov.au (2025).

projects.projectName: Port Hedland Export-Scale Green Hydrogen Project
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 — position for FID expected Q4 2026, massive HV infrastructure.
projects.summary: A massive green hydrogen and ammonia production facility powered by up to 13GW of combined solar and wind generation, requiring extensive new HV transmission lines, substations, and potentially BESS for grid stability.
projects.statusNote: Proponents progressing feasibility studies and early environmental approvals. Final Investment Decision expected ~2026. Source: bp.com (2024).

projects.projectName: Northern Goldfields Solar Project (Fortescue Metals Group)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — commissioning FAT/QAQC for BESS and substation integration.
projects.summary: 100MW solar farm with a 200MWh BESS to power Fortescue's mining operations. Includes a new substation and HV transmission line for connection. Expected completion and commissioning in 2025.
projects.statusNote: FID announced Q4 2023, construction commenced H1 2024. HV equipment procurement was Q4 2023/Q1 2024. Commissioning expected 2025. Source: fmgl.com.au (2023).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — final FAT/QAQC for grid interconnection and commissioning.
projects.summary: 200MW / 800MWh Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) in WA, with significant HV grid connection and substation upgrades. Nearing completion, with commissioning in 2025.
projects.statusNote: Construction commenced mid-2023. HV equipment procurement was Q3 2023/Q1 2024. Expected completion and commissioning 2024/2025. Source: synergy.net.au (2024).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — commissioning FAT/QAQC for HV substation and grid connection.
projects.summary: Expansion of the Goyder South wind farm, adding 412MW of capacity. Requires significant HV export infrastructure, including a new substation and transmission line. Expected completion in 2025.
projects.statusNote: FID for Stage 2 achieved late 2023. Construction commenced H1 2024. HV equipment orders for substations and grid connection likely placed Q4 2023/Q1 2024. Source: neoen.com (2024).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — ongoing HV infrastructure for later phases and grid connection.
projects.summary: One of Australia's largest onshore wind farms, comprising 1026MW across multiple phases. Requires extensive new HV transmission lines and substations (including transformers and switchgear) for grid connection. Expected full operation in 2025.
projects.statusNote: Under construction since 2022, with multiple stages and ongoing HV infrastructure work for later phases and grid connection. Source: cleanco.com.au (2025).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — ongoing HV infrastructure for later stages and grid connection.
projects.summary: Large wind farm in Queensland with an initial 450MW capacity, expandable. Includes new HV transmission infrastructure and substations. Phased connection with full operation expected in 2025.
projects.statusNote: Under construction since 2022, with stages being progressively connected. HV infrastructure for later stages and grid integration still active. Source: neoen.com (2025).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — ongoing HV equipment procurement and installation for substations and lines.
projects.summary: New 330kV transmission line connecting South Australia and New South Wales. Involves extensive HV equipment including transformers, circuit breakers, GIS, and new substations across multiple segments. Expected completion late 2026.
projects.statusNote: Under construction, with major HV equipment procurement and installation ongoing for remaining segments and substations. Source: transgrid.com.au (2025).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2024 — HV equipment procurement for grid connection imminent.
projects.summary: 270MW / 540MWh Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) adjacent to the Western Downs Green Power Hub. Requires significant HV substation and grid connection infrastructure, including transformers and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: FID announced March 2024. Construction expected to start mid-2024. HV equipment orders for grid connection expected H2 2024. Source: neoen.com (2024).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2026 — major HV transmission and substation packages for future REZ.
projects.summary: Proposed new 500kV double circuit transmission line and associated substations in Victoria to connect future renewable projects. Focus on large-scale HV transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS equipment.
projects.statusNote: Early stages of planning and environmental assessments underway. FID expected 2026-2027. Source: transgrid.com.au (2024).

projects.projectName: Kurri Kurri Gas Power Station (BESS Component)
projects.projectValue: AUD 600 million (gas plant), BESS component TBD
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q1 2025 — BESS procurement imminent, requires HV integration.
projects.summary: While the main gas plant is under construction, a significant BESS component is planned, requiring new HV interconnection, transformers, and switchgear for grid stability. BESS procurement is expected to follow.
projects.statusNote: Main gas plant construction underway. BESS component's scope and procurement timeline are being firmed up, with specific HV requirements. Source: snowyhydro.com.au (2024).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — FAT/QAQC for final integration and commissioning of HV systems.
projects.summary: A giant 700MW / 1400MWh Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) designed to act as a 'virtual transmission line'. Involves massive HV transformers, circuit breakers, and substation infrastructure. Expected energization H2 2025.
projects.statusNote: Construction commenced early 2023. HV equipment procurement occurred Q2/Q3 2023. Nearing completion, with energization expected H2 2025, implying active commissioning and integration. Source: energyco.nsw.gov.au (2025).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q1 2025 — new HV components for expansion, procurement imminent.
projects.summary: Proposed expansion of the existing 300MW battery to an additional 150MW, increasing total capacity to 450MW. Requires new HV connections and substation upgrades for grid integration.
projects.statusNote: Expansion announced 2023. Construction for expansion expected 2024-2025, with HV equipment orders H2 2024 / H1 2025. Source: reneweconomy.com.au (2024).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — major HV transmission and substation packages currently in tender.
projects.summary: Major 500kV transmission line upgrade in NSW, spanning 360km, vital for connecting new REZs. Involves extensive new HV transmission infrastructure and substations, including transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS.
projects.statusNote: Environmental approvals and land acquisition ongoing. EPC tender process for major components (lines, substations) expected to intensify H2 2024 / H1 2025. Source: transgrid.com.au (2025).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q2 2025 — new substation and grid connection procurement for hyperscale data centre.
projects.summary: Hyperscale data centre expansion (MEL3) requiring significant and reliable HV grid connection upgrades, including new substations, HV transformers, and switchgear to support its critical power demands.
projects.statusNote: Announced 2023 for development. Planning for HV grid connection upgrades and substations is ongoing. Construction expected 2025-2026. Source: globalswitch.com (2024).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — continuous HV infrastructure procurement for ongoing data centre expansion.
projects.summary: Ongoing expansion of AWS hyperscale data centre presence in the Sydney region. Involves continuous development of new facilities and capacity upgrades, each requiring substantial HV power infrastructure including new substations, transformers, and switchgear for reliable grid connections.
projects.statusNote: Continuous development and expansion, with new facilities regularly planned and executed. HV power infrastructure upgrades and new substations are integral and ongoing. Source: aws.amazon.com (2025).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — continuous HV infrastructure procurement for ongoing data centre expansion.
projects.summary: Continuous expansion of Microsoft Azure's hyperscale data centre footprint in Australia. Involves ongoing planning and construction of new facilities and upgrades, requiring significant investment in HV power delivery infrastructure, new substations, transformers, and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Ongoing development and expansion, with new facilities being planned or under construction. Requires substantial investment in HV power delivery infrastructure. Source: azure.microsoft.com (2025).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — final electromechanical and HV equipment installation, testing and commissioning.
projects.summary: 250MW / 2000MWh pumped hydro energy storage project. Includes a new 186km 275kV transmission line and associated substations, involving significant HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear. Expected commissioning H1 2025.
projects.statusNote: Under construction. Main civil works largely complete. Electromechanical and HV equipment installation ongoing. Commissioning expected H1 2025. Source: genexpower.com.au (2024).

projects.projectName: Central West Orana REZ Transmission Network
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — ongoing HV equipment procurement and installation for substations and lines.
projects.summary: Enabling transmission infrastructure for the first declared REZ in NSW. Involves major HV transmission lines and substations (transformers, circuit breakers, GIS). Procurement has been ongoing with segments continuing into 2025 for installation and commissioning.
projects.statusNote: Under construction. HV equipment procurement has been ongoing since 2023, with segments continuing into 2025 for installation and commissioning. Source: transgrid.com.au (2025).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q2 2026 — main project FID expected, massive HVDC and BESS components.
projects.summary: World's largest solar PV and BESS project, with up to 20GW solar, 42GWh BESS, and HVDC subsea cable to Darwin and potentially Singapore. Future procurement for massive HVDC converters, cables, BESS, transformers, and switchgear.
projects.statusNote: Project in advanced development, under new ownership. Strategic Partner MoU signed Q1 2024. FID for early works expected H2 2024, main project FID 2025-2026. Source: suncable.energy (2024).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — HV equipment upgrades and installation ongoing into 2025.
projects.summary: Upgrade of the existing AC interconnector between Queensland and New South Wales to increase transfer capacity. Involves substation works, including new HV transformers, circuit breakers, and control systems. Upgrades and installation ongoing into 2025.
projects.statusNote: Under construction. Transgrid and Powerlink are the proponents. HV equipment upgrades and installation ongoing into 2025. Source: powerlink.com.au (2024).

projects.projectName: Port Augusta Green Hydrogen Plant (CU-River Mining)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 — FID expected late 2025, position for associated HV infrastructure.
projects.summary: Proposed large-scale green hydrogen and ammonia plant, powered by up to 1GW of new renewable energy (solar/wind). Requires extensive HV transmission infrastructure and substations for power input and export.
projects.statusNote: Feasibility studies and planning underway. Environmental approvals sought. FID expected late 2025 / 2026. Source: curiver.com.au (2024).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — ongoing HV equipment procurement and installation for substations and lines.
projects.summary: The NSW section of the Project EnergyConnect interconnector. Involves substantial new 330kV transmission lines, three new substations, and equipment including HV transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS. Construction and HV equipment procurement and installation ongoing into 2025/2026.
projects.statusNote: Under construction. HV equipment procurement and installation ongoing into 2025/2026. Source: transgrid.com.au (2025).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2026 — major procurement for HV lines and substations to follow FID.
projects.summary: New HV interconnector between Victoria and NSW to bolster grid capacity and connect new renewable energy. Will require new HV transmission lines, substations, large transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS.
projects.statusNote: Planning and regulatory approvals ongoing. FID expected 2025-2026. Major procurement for lines and substations to follow. Source: aemo.com.au (2024).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — continuous HV infrastructure procurement for ongoing data centre expansion.
projects.summary: Continuous development by various providers for hyperscale facilities in Melbourne. These projects require new substations or major grid upgrades, including HV transformers, switchgear, and dedicated transmission infrastructure for critical power supply.
projects.statusNote: Ongoing, phased construction across multiple sites. New substations and grid connections are regularly planned and built. Source: utilitymagazine.com.au (2025).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q2 2025 — FID expected, HV grid connection procurement imminent.
projects.summary: Proposed 400MW wind farm requiring a new HV substation and grid connection infrastructure to export power to the Queensland network. Expected FID in 2025.
projects.statusNote: Environmental approvals and grid connection studies underway. FID expected 2025. Source: rwe.com (2024).

projects.projectName: New South Wales Data Centre (Microsoft Expansion)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — continuous HV infrastructure procurement for ongoing data centre expansion.
projects.summary: Microsoft's continuous expansion in NSW, including new data centre facilities requiring significant HV power infrastructure, new substations, transformers, and switchgear for reliable grid connections. Part of a A$5 billion investment over 2 years.
projects.statusNote: Ongoing development and expansion. HV infrastructure planning and procurement for new sites or capacity upgrades are continuous, supported by a A$5 billion investment announced in 2024. Source: news.microsoft.com (2024).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — commissioning FAT/QAQC for HV substation and grid connection.
projects.summary: Large wind farm complex in Bahia state, comprising 360MW. Includes new HV transmission lines, substations, transformers, and switchgear for grid integration. Expected completion in 2025.
projects.statusNote: FID announced Q4 2023. Construction commenced H1 2024. HV equipment for substations and grid connection ordered Q1 2024. Expected completion 2025. Source: aesbrasil.com.br (2024).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — ongoing HV equipment procurement for new stages and grid connection.
projects.summary: One of the largest solar complexes in Latin America. While Stage 1 is operational, further stages are planned/under construction. This phased development involves continuous procurement for HV equipment, including transformers, circuit breakers, and substations for new connections.
projects.statusNote: Stage 1 operational (2023). Stage 2 (400MW) received commercial operation approval Q1 2024. Further stages planned/under construction. HV equipment for new stages will be procured. Source: elerarenovaveis.com.br (2024).

projects.projectName: Rio Grande do Norte Transmission Lines (ANEEL Auction 2023)
projects.projectValue: BRL 2.5 billion (total for lots in RN)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 — detailed design and early procurement for HV components.
projects.summary: Multiple new HV transmission lines (e.g., 500kV) and associated substations auctioned by ANEEL to connect new wind and solar projects in Rio Grande do Norte. Involves extensive procurement of HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear. Construction expected 2025-2027.
projects.statusNote: Auctions held 2023/2024, winning bidders are now in detailed design and early procurement phases. Construction expected 2025-2027. Source: aneel.gov.br (2024).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — continuous HV infrastructure procurement for ongoing data centre expansion.
projects.summary: Ascenty is expanding its data centre footprint in Brazil, including new facilities in Minas Gerais. These hyperscale data centres require significant and reliable HV grid connections, new substations, HV transformers, and switchgear for robust power delivery.
projects.statusNote: New data centres under development or recently completed, with continuous planning for power infrastructure upgrades. Source: ascenty.com (2024).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 — FID expected, HV equipment procurement imminent.
projects.summary: New large-scale wind farm project in Rio Grande do Norte. Requires a new HV substation and transmission line for grid connection, including transformers and switchgear. FID expected late 2024, construction H1 2025.
projects.statusNote: Project secured PPA in 2023. FID expected late 2024, construction H1 2025. HV equipment procurement H2 2025. Source: voltalia.com (2024).

projects.projectName: Arara Azul Solar Project (Atlas Renewable Energy)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — commissioning FAT/QAQC for HV substation and grid connection.
projects.summary: Large-scale solar PV project in Minas Gerais. Requires new HV substation and grid connection, including transformers and switchgear. Expected commercial operation in 2025.
projects.statusNote: Construction commenced mid-2024. HV equipment orders placed Q1 2024. Expected commercial operation 2025. Source: atlasrenewableenergy.com (2024).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — commissioning FAT/QAQC for BESS and substation integration.
projects.summary: Expansion of Eneva's gas-to-wire complex to include a 190MW / 760MWh BESS. Involves new HV interconnection equipment, transformers, and switchgear for robust grid stability. Expected operation in 2025.
projects.statusNote: BESS announced 2023. FID for BESS Q4 2023. Construction started H1 2024. HV equipment procurement Q1 2024. Expected operation 2025. Source: eneva.com.br (2024).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate — commissioning FAT/QAQC for HV substation and grid connection.
projects.summary: Large solar complex (200MW) for corporate PPA (Votorantim Cimentos' own consumption). Requires a new HV substation and grid connection, including transformers and switchgear. Expected operation in 2025.
projects.statusNote: Construction commenced early 2024. HV equipment procurement H2 2023/Q1 2024. Expected operation 2025. Source: votorantimcimentos.com.br (2024).

projects.projectName: Porto do Açu Green Hydrogen Hub
projects.location: Porto do Açu, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 — FID for initial phases expected, massive associated HV infrastructure.
projects.summary: Major green hydrogen production hub, with multiple phases and partners. Requires significant new renewable energy input (solar/wind), extensive HV transmission upgrades, and new substations for power supply.
projects.statusNote: Early studies, environmental licensing, and FID for initial phases expected from 2025. Large-scale renewable generation and grid connection planning. Source: portodoacu.com.br (2024).

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 — major HV component procurement imminent.
projects.summary: New 500kV and 230kV transmission lines and substations connecting Bahia and Minas Gerais. Awarded in ANEEL auction. Involves extensive procurement of HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear for new substations and line connections.
projects.statusNote: Project awarded in ANEEL auction (Lot 2, 2023). Detailed design and licensing underway. Procurement for HV components expected H2 2025. Source: canalenergia.com.br (2024).
